{"code":"(let [incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"})]

      {:action "posted to Slack" :count 0})
    (let [ids (map :id incidents)
          body (str "Incidents requiring triage:\n" (clojure.string/join "\n" ids))]
